name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 18 Oct 2022
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we made quite a few enhancements to our SMS-related features."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn what changed, read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"  "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"New SMS Contact List Dashboard","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can now view all relevant information and statistics for any SMS contact list in a single-view dashboard. The dashboard consists of the list details, at-a-glance information (such as total contacts, subscribers, unsubscribers), and the list of campaigns that use the contact list. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Click the list name on the SMS Contact List to navigate to the dashboard. To learn more about SMS contact lists, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/SMS-Contact-Lists","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"SMS Contact Lists","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SMSContactListDashboard.0685g000009wPxgAAE.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SMSContactListDashboard.0685g000009wPxgAAE.png","name":"SMS Contact List Dashboard","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1652,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Filtering Options for Including Campaigns in Custom SMS Report","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On step 2 of the Custom SMS Campaign Report page, two new checkboxes – "},{"text":"Journey campaign","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"SMS campaign","bold":true},{"text":" – have been introduced. You can use these checkboxes to filter the campaign names in the Campaign Name drop-down field based on SMS campaign type (Journey or regular)."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For more information about Custom SMS Campaign Report, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Custom-SMS-Campaign-Report","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Custom SMS Campaign Report","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CustomSMSCampaignReportStep2.0685g000009wPuhAAE.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CustomSMSCampaignReportStep2.0685g000009wPuhAAE.png","name":"Custom SMS Campaign Report - Step 2","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1256,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"If the Journey campaign checkbox is selected, the Campaign Name field shows only the Journey SMS campaigns for the selected date range."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"If the SMS campaign checkbox is selected, the Campaign Name field shows only the SMS campaigns for the selected date range."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"If both checkboxes are selected, the Campaign Name field shows both Journey SMS campaigns and SMS campaigns for the selected date range."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" Usage Scenario: Let’s say, you want to create a custom report with all Journey SMS campaigns for a date range. To do so, you can do the following in step 2 of the report creation flow: "}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Select the Journey campaign checkbox. This populates the Campaign Name drop-down field with only the Journey SMS campaigns created during the selected period."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Then, in the Campaign Name field, you can select the Select All option to include all Journey SMS campaigns."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"  "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Adding Permanently Failed Contacts into SMS Do Not Mail (DNM) List","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The failed contacts now automatically get added to the SMS DNM list. This will help you identify and get rid of the numbers that are invalid or unavailable."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When an SMS campaign doesn’t get delivered to a contact, it is considered to be a delivery failure. Based on the error code, we identify the occurrence to be a temporary failure or a permanent failure. And then, the contacts from permanent failures are automatically added to the SMS DNM list."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For more information about managing the SMS DNM list, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/SMS-Contact-Lists","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"SMS Contact Lists","bold":true}]},{"text":" and "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Suppression-Do-Not-Mail-Lists","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Suppression (Do Not Mail) Lists","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]}]
